name: ayukko-nursery-automation
description: あゆっこ保育園 業務自動化システム

scripts.deploy:stg: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name ayukko-stg --config wrangler.staging.jsonc --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name ayukko-prod --commit-dirty=true
scripts.db:migrate:stg: wrangler d1 migrations apply ayukko-staging --remote --config wrangler.staging.jsonc
scripts.db:seed:local: wrangler d1 execute ayukko-production --local --file=./seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute ayukko-production --local --file=./seed.dev.sql
scripts.db:seed:stg: wrangler d1 execute ayukko-staging --remote --file=./seed.sql --config wrangler.staging.jsonc && wrangler d1 execute ayukko-staging --remote --file=./seed.dev.sql --config wrangler.staging.jsonc
scripts.db:reset: rm -rf .wrangler/state/v3/d1 && npm run db:migrate:local && npm run db:seed:local
